dict.string:
That's a clean success. Now add the microphone permissions:
```bash open ios/App/App/Info.plist ```
This opens in Xcode. You'll see a list of keys. Right-click any row → **Add Row**, then add these two entries:
| Key | Type | Value | |---|---|---| | Privacy - Microphone Usage Description | String | Used for hands-free voice input during the vision test. | | Privacy - Speech Recognition Usage Description | String | Listens for spoken letters during the vision chart test. |
Save with **Cmd+S**, then come back to Terminal and run:
```bash git add ios/ git commit -m "Add iOS Capacitor project with microphone permissions" git push origin main ```
Then open Xcode:
```bash npx cap open ios ``` Used for hands-free voice input during vision test.

That's a clean success. Now add the microphone permissions:
```bash open ios/App/App/Info.plist ```
This opens in Xcode. You'll see a list of keys. Right-click any row → **Add Row**, then add these two entries:
| Key | Type | Value | |---|---|---| | Privacy - Microphone Usage Description | String | Used for hands-free voice input during the vision test. | | Privacy - Speech Recognition Usage Description | String | Listens for spoken letters during the vision chart test. |
Save with **Cmd+S**, then come back to Terminal and run:
```bash git add ios/ git commit -m "Add iOS Capacitor project with microphone permissions" git push origin main ```
Then open Xcode:
```bash npx cap open ios ```
Listens for spoken letters during the gision chart test.
